# GHN Design System — Full reference

## Khả năng tiếp cận (Hướng dẫn)

Cam kết WCAG 2.1 AA và cách áp dụng trong GHN DS.

## Affix (Điều hướng)

Ghim một phần tử ở vị trí cố định trên màn hình khi người dùng cuộn trang.

Import: `import { Affix } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| className | `string` | no | - |  |
| offsetBottom | `number` | no | - | Triggered when the specified offset is reached from the bottom of the window |
| offsetTop | `number` | no | - | Triggered when the specified offset is reached from the top of the window |
| onChange | `((affixed?: boolean) => void)` | no | - | Callback function triggered when fixed state changes |
| onTestUpdatePosition | `(() => void)` | no | - |  |
| prefixCls | `string` | no | - |  |
| rootClassName | `string` | no | - |  |
| style | `CSSProperties` | no | - |  |
| target | `(() => Window | HTMLElement | null)` | no | - | Set the element that Affix needs to listen to its scroll event, the value is a function that returns the corresponding DOM element |

## Alert (Phản hồi)

Thông báo theo ngữ cảnh ngay trong trang.

Import: `import { Alert } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| action | `ReactNode` | no | - |  |
| afterClose | `(() => void)` | no | - | @deprecated please use `closable.afterClose` instead. |
| banner | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| className | `string` | no | - |  |
| classNames | `DeepClassNameType<{ root?: string; icon?: string; section?: string | undefined; title?: string | undefined; description?: string | undefined; actions?: string | undefined; close?: string | undefined; } | undefined> | ((info: { ...; }) => DeepClassNameType<...>)` | no | - |  |
| closable | `boolean | (ClosableType & AriaAttributes & { onClose?: MouseEventHandler<HTMLButtonElement>; })` | no | - | Whether Alert can be closed |
| closeIcon | `ReactNode` | no | - | @deprecated please use `closable.closeIcon` instead. |
| closeText | `ReactNode` | no | - | @deprecated please use `closable.closeIcon` instead. Close text to show |
| description | `ReactNode` | no | - | Additional content of Alert |
| icon | `ReactNode` | no | - |  |
| id | `string` | no | - |  |
| message | `ReactNode` | no | - | @deprecated please use `title` instead. |
| onClick | `MouseEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>` | no | - |  |
| onClose | `MouseEventHandler<HTMLButtonElement>` | no | - | @deprecated please use `closable.onClose` instead. |
| onMouseEnter | `MouseEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>` | no | - |  |
| onMouseLeave | `MouseEventHandler<HTMLDivElement>` | no | - |  |
| prefixCls | `string` | no | - |  |
| role | `string` | no | - | https://www.w3.org/TR/2014/REC-html5-20141028/dom.html#aria-role-attribute |
| rootClassName | `string` | no | - |  |
| showIcon | `boolean` | no | - | Whether to show icon |
| style | `CSSProperties` | no | - |  |
| styles | `DeepStylesType<{ root?: CSSProperties; icon?: CSSProperties; section?: CSSProperties | undefined; title?: CSSProperties | undefined; description?: CSSProperties | undefined; actions?: CSSProperties | undefined; close?: CSSProperties | undefined; } | undefined> | ((info: { ...; }) => DeepStyle...` | no | - |  |
| title | `ReactNode` | no | - | Content of Alert |
| type | `enum` | no | - | Type of Alert styles, options:`success`, `info`, `warning`, `error` |
| variant | `enum` | no | - | Variant of Alert style @since 6.4.0 |

## Anchor (Điều hướng)

Mục lục neo tới các phần trong trang.

Import: `import { Anchor } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| affix | `boolean | Omit<AffixProps, "offsetTop" | "target" | "children">` | no | - |  |
| bounds | `number` | no | - |  |
| children | `ReactNode` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `items` instead. |
| className | `string` | no | - |  |
| classNames | `DeepClassNameType<{ root?: string; item?: string; itemTitle?: string | undefined; indicator?: string | undefined; } | undefined> | ((info: { ...; }) => DeepClassNameType<...>)` | no | - |  |
| direction | `enum` | no | - |  |
| getContainer | `(() => AnchorContainer)` | no | - |  |
| getCurrentAnchor | `((activeLink: string) => string)` | no | - | Return customize highlight anchor |
| items | `AnchorLinkItemProps[]` | no | - |  |
| offsetTop | `number` | no | - |  |
| onChange | `((currentActiveLink: string) => void)` | no | - | Listening event when scrolling change active link |
| onClick | `((e: MouseEvent<HTMLElement, MouseEvent>, link: { title: ReactNode; href: string; }) => void)` | no | - |  |
| prefixCls | `string` | no | - |  |
| replace | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| rootClassName | `string` | no | - |  |
| showInkInFixed | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| style | `CSSProperties` | no | - |  |
| styles | `DeepStylesType<{ root?: CSSProperties; item?: CSSProperties; itemTitle?: CSSProperties | undefined; indicator?: CSSProperties | undefined; } | undefined> | ((info: { ...; }) => DeepStylesType<...>)` | no | - |  |
| targetOffset | `number` | no | - | Scroll to target offset value, if none, it's offsetTop prop value or 0. |

## AutoComplete (Nhập liệu)

Gợi ý hoàn thành khi gõ vào ô tìm kiếm.

Import: `import { AutoComplete } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| bordered | `boolean` | no | - | @deprecated Use `variant` instead. |
| classNames | `((info: { props: AutoCompleteProps<any, DefaultOptionType>; }) => DeepClassNameType<{ root?: string; prefix?: string; input?: string | undefined; placeholder?: string | undefined; content?: string | undefined; popup?: DeepClassNameType<...>; } | undefined>) | DeepClassNameType<...>` | no | - |  |
| dataSource | `DataSourceItemType[]` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `options` instead |
| disabled | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| dropdownClassName | `string` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `classNames.popup.root` instead |
| dropdownMatchSelectWidth | `number | boolean` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `popupMatchSelectWidth` instead |
| dropdownRender | `((menu: ReactElement<unknown, string | JSXElementConstructor<any>>) => ReactElement<unknown, string | JSXElementConstructor<any>>)` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `popupRender` instead |
| dropdownStyle | `CSSProperties` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `styles.popup.root` instead |
| loadingIcon | `ReactNode` | no | - |  |
| onDropdownVisibleChange | `((visible: boolean) => void)` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `onOpenChange` instead |
| onOpenChange | `((visible: boolean) => void)` | no | - |  |
| popupClassName | `string` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `classNames.popup.root` instead |
| popupMatchSelectWidth | `number | boolean` | no | - |  |
| popupRender | `((menu: ReactElement<unknown, string | JSXElementConstructor<any>>) => ReactElement<unknown, string | JSXElementConstructor<any>>)` | no | - |  |
| prefix | `ReactNode` | no | - |  |
| rootClassName | `string` | no | - |  |
| showArrow | `boolean` | no | - | @deprecated `showArrow` is deprecated which will be removed in next major version. It will be a default behavior, you can hide it by setting `suffixIcon` to null. |
| showSearch | `boolean | (SearchConfig<OptionType> & { searchIcon?: ReactNode; })` | no | - |  |
| size | `enum` | no | - |  |
| status | `enum` | no | - |  |
| styles | `((info: { props: AutoCompleteProps<any, DefaultOptionType>; }) => DeepStylesType<{ root?: CSSProperties; prefix?: CSSProperties; input?: CSSProperties | undefined; placeholder?: CSSProperties | undefined; content?: CSSProperties | undefined; popup?: DeepStylesType<...>; } | undefined>) | Deep...` | no | - |  |
| suffixIcon | `ReactNode` | no | - |  |
| variant | `enum` | no | "outlined" | @since 5.13.0 |

## Avatar (Hiển thị dữ liệu)

Đại diện người dùng bằng ảnh, chữ cái hoặc icon.

Import: `import { Avatar } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| alt | `string` | no | - |  |
| className | `string` | no | - |  |
| crossOrigin | `enum` | no | - |  |
| draggable | `boolean | "true" | "false"` | no | - |  |
| gap | `number` | no | - |  |
| icon | `ReactNode` | no | - | Icon to be used in avatar |
| onClick | `((e?: MouseEvent<HTMLElement, MouseEvent>) => void)` | no | - |  |
| onError | `(() => boolean)` | no | - |  |
| prefixCls | `string` | no | - |  |
| rootClassName | `string` | no | - |  |
| shape | `enum` | no | - | Shape of avatar, options: `circle`, `square` |
| size | `AvatarSize` | no | - |  |
| src | `ReactNode` | no | - | Src of image avatar |
| srcSet | `string` | no | - | Srcset of image avatar |
| style | `CSSProperties` | no | - |  |

## BackTop (Điều hướng)

Nút cuộn nhanh về đầu trang, xuất hiện khi người dùng đã cuộn xuống đủ xa.

Import: `import { BackTop } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| className | `string` | no | - |  |
| duration | `number` | no | - |  |
| onClick | `MouseEventHandler<HTMLElement>` | no | - |  |
| prefixCls | `string` | no | - |  |
| rootClassName | `string` | no | - |  |
| style | `CSSProperties` | no | - |  |
| target | `(() => HTMLElement | Window | Document)` | no | - |  |
| visibilityHeight | `number` | no | - |  |

## Badge (Hiển thị dữ liệu)

Chấm hoặc số nhỏ báo trạng thái/đếm.

Import: `import { Badge } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| className | `string` | no | - |  |
| classNames | `((info: { props: BadgeProps; }) => DeepClassNameType<{ root?: string; indicator?: string; } | undefined>) | DeepClassNameType<{ root?: string | undefined; indicator?: string | undefined; } | undefined>` | no | - |  |
| color | `LiteralUnion<"blue" | "purple" | "cyan" | "green" | "magenta" | "pink" | "red" | "orange" | "yellow" | "volcano" | "geekblue" | "lime" | "gold">` | no | - |  |
| count | `ReactNode` | no | - | Number to show in badge |
| dot | `boolean` | no | - | Whether to show red dot without number |
| offset | `[string | number, string | number]` | no | - |  |
| overflowCount | `number` | no | - | Max count to show |
| prefixCls | `string` | no | - |  |
| rootClassName | `string` | no | - |  |
| scrollNumberPrefixCls | `string` | no | - |  |
| showZero | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| size | `enum` | no | - | Note: `default` is deprecated and will be removed in v7, please use `medium` instead. |
| status | `enum` | no | - |  |
| style | `CSSProperties` | no | - |  |
| styles | `((info: { props: BadgeProps; }) => DeepStylesType<{ root?: CSSProperties; indicator?: CSSProperties; } | undefined>) | DeepStylesType<...>` | no | - |  |
| text | `ReactNode` | no | - |  |
| title | `string` | no | - |  |

## Đường viền (Nền tảng)

Độ dày và màu đường viền để phân tách và nhấn.

## Breadcrumb (Điều hướng)

Cho biết vị trí trong cấu trúc phân cấp.

Import: `import { Breadcrumb } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| className | `string` | no | - |  |
| classNames | `DeepClassNameType<{ root?: string; item?: string; separator?: string | undefined; } | undefined> | ((info: { props: BreadcrumbProps<T>; }) => DeepClassNameType<...>)` | no | - |  |
| dropdownIcon | `ReactNode` | no | - |  |
| itemRender | `((route: Partial<BreadcrumbItemType & BreadcrumbSeparatorType>, params: T, routes: Partial<BreadcrumbItemType & BreadcrumbSeparatorType>[], paths: string[]) => ReactNode)` | no | - |  |
| items | `Partial<BreadcrumbItemType & BreadcrumbSeparatorType>[]` | no | - |  |
| params | `AnyObject` | no | - |  |
| prefixCls | `string` | no | - |  |
| rootClassName | `string` | no | - |  |
| routes | `Partial<BreadcrumbItemType & BreadcrumbSeparatorType>[]` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `items` instead |
| separator | `ReactNode` | no | - |  |
| style | `CSSProperties` | no | - |  |
| styles | `DeepStylesType<{ root?: CSSProperties; item?: CSSProperties; separator?: CSSProperties | undefined; } | undefined> | ((info: { ...; }) => DeepStylesType<...>)` | no | - |  |

## Điểm ngắt & Lưới (Nền tảng)

Hệ điểm ngắt responsive và lưới 24 cột, mobile-first.

## Button (Cơ bản)

Nút kích hoạt hành động; mỗi màn hình một hành động chính.

Import: `import { Button } from 'antd';`

## Calendar (Hiển thị dữ liệu)

Lịch tháng/năm hiển thị và chọn ngày, gắn sự kiện.

Import: `import { Calendar } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| cellRender | `((date: Dayjs, info: CellRenderInfo<Dayjs>) => ReactNode)` | no | - |  |
| className | `string` | no | - |  |
| classNames | `DeepClassNameType<{ root?: string; header?: string; body?: string | undefined; content?: string | undefined; item?: string | undefined; itemContent?: string | undefined; } | undefined> | ((info: { ...; }) => DeepClassNameType<...>)` | no | - |  |
| dateCellRender | `((date: Dayjs) => ReactNode)` | no | - | @deprecated Please use cellRender instead. |
| dateFullCellRender | `((date: Dayjs) => ReactNode)` | no | - | @deprecated Please use fullCellRender instead. |
| defaultValue | `Dayjs` | no | - |  |
| disabledDate | `((date: Dayjs) => boolean)` | no | - |  |
| fullCellRender | `((date: Dayjs, info: CellRenderInfo<Dayjs>) => ReactNode)` | no | - |  |
| fullscreen | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| headerRender | `HeaderRender<Dayjs>` | no | - |  |
| locale | `PickerLocale` | no | - |  |
| mode | `enum` | no | - |  |
| monthCellRender | `((date: Dayjs) => ReactNode)` | no | - | @deprecated Please use cellRender instead. |
| monthFullCellRender | `((date: Dayjs) => ReactNode)` | no | - | @deprecated Please use fullCellRender instead. |
| onChange | `((date: Dayjs) => void)` | no | - |  |
| onPanelChange | `((date: Dayjs, mode: CalendarMode) => void)` | no | - |  |
| onSelect | `((date: Dayjs, selectInfo: SelectInfo) => void)` | no | - |  |
| prefixCls | `string` | no | - |  |
| rootClassName | `string` | no | - |  |
| showWeek | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| style | `CSSProperties` | no | - |  |
| styles | `DeepStylesType<{ root?: CSSProperties; header?: CSSProperties; body?: CSSProperties | undefined; content?: CSSProperties | undefined; item?: CSSProperties | undefined; itemContent?: CSSProperties | undefined; } | undefined> | ((info: { ...; }) => DeepStylesType<...>)` | no | - |  |
| validRange | `[Dayjs, Dayjs]` | no | - |  |
| value | `Dayjs` | no | - |  |

## Card (Hiển thị dữ liệu)

Khối nội dung gom nhóm với tiêu đề, thân, hành động.

Import: `import { Card } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| actions | `ReactNode[]` | no | - |  |
| activeTabKey | `string` | no | - |  |
| bodyStyle | `CSSProperties` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `styles.body` instead |
| bordered | `boolean` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `variant` instead |
| className | `string` | no | - |  |
| classNames | `((info: { props: CardProps; }) => DeepClassNameType<{ root?: string; header?: string; body?: string | undefined; extra?: string | undefined; title?: string | undefined; actions?: string | undefined; cover?: string | undefined; } | undefined>) | DeepClassNameType<...>` | no | - |  |
| cover | `ReactNode` | no | - |  |
| defaultActiveTabKey | `string` | no | - |  |
| extra | `ReactNode` | no | - |  |
| headStyle | `CSSProperties` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `styles.header` instead |
| hoverable | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| id | `string` | no | - |  |
| loading | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| onTabChange | `((key: string) => void)` | no | - |  |
| prefixCls | `string` | no | - |  |
| rootClassName | `string` | no | - |  |
| size | `enum` | no | - |  |
| style | `CSSProperties` | no | - |  |
| styles | `((info: { props: CardProps; }) => DeepStylesType<{ root?: CSSProperties; header?: CSSProperties; body?: CSSProperties | undefined; extra?: CSSProperties | undefined; title?: CSSProperties | undefined; actions?: CSSProperties | undefined; cover?: CSSProperties | undefined; } | undefined>) | De...` | no | - |  |
| tabBarExtraContent | `TabBarExtraContent` | no | - |  |
| tabList | `CardTabListType[]` | no | - |  |
| tabProps | `TabsProps` | no | - |  |
| title | `ReactNode` | no | - |  |
| type | `enum` | no | - |  |
| variant | `enum` | no | - |  |

## Carousel (Hiển thị dữ liệu)

Trình chiếu nội dung trượt ngang theo slide.

Import: `import { Carousel } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| autoplay | `boolean | { dotDuration?: boolean; }` | no | - |  |
| dotPlacement | `enum` | no | - |  |
| dotPosition | `enum` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `dotPlacement` instead |
| dots | `boolean | { className?: string; }` | no | - |  |
| effect | `enum` | no | - |  |
| id | `string` | no | - |  |
| prefixCls | `string` | no | - |  |
| rootClassName | `string` | no | - |  |
| slickGoTo | `number` | no | - |  |
| style | `CSSProperties` | no | - |  |
| waitForAnimate | `boolean` | no | - |  |

## Cascader (Nhập liệu)

Chọn giá trị phân cấp qua các cột liên tiếp.

Import: `import { Cascader } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| bordered | `boolean` | no | - | @deprecated Use `variant` instead. |
| classNames | `((info: { props: CascaderProps<DefaultOptionType, string, boolean>; }) => DeepClassNameType<{ root?: string; prefix?: string; suffix?: string | undefined; ... 6 more ...; popup?: { ...; } | undefined; } | undefined>) | DeepClassNameType<...>` | no | - |  |
| disabled | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| dropdownClassName | `string` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `classNames.popup.root` instead |
| dropdownMenuColumnStyle | `CSSProperties` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `styles.popup.listItem` instead |
| dropdownRender | `((menu: ReactElement<unknown, string | JSXElementConstructor<any>>) => ReactElement<unknown, string | JSXElementConstructor<any>>)` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `popupRender` instead |
| dropdownStyle | `CSSProperties` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `styles.popup.root` instead |
| multiple | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| onDropdownVisibleChange | `((visible: boolean) => void)` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `onOpenChange` instead |
| onOpenChange | `((visible: boolean) => void)` | no | - |  |
| onPopupVisibleChange | `((visible: boolean) => void)` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `onOpenChange` instead |
| options | `OptionType[]` | no | - |  |
| placement | `enum` | no | - |  |
| popupClassName | `string` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `classNames.popup.root` instead |
| popupMenuColumnStyle | `CSSProperties` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `styles.popup.listItem` instead |
| popupRender | `((menu: ReactElement<unknown, string | JSXElementConstructor<any>>) => ReactElement<unknown, string | JSXElementConstructor<any>>)` | no | - |  |
| rootClassName | `string` | no | - |  |
| showArrow | `boolean` | no | - | @deprecated `showArrow` is deprecated which will be removed in next major version. It will be a default behavior, you can hide it by setting `suffixIcon` to null. |
| showSearch | `boolean | (SearchConfig<OptionType, keyof OptionType> & { searchIcon?: ReactNode; })` | no | - |  |
| size | `enum` | no | - |  |
| status | `enum` | no | - |  |
| styles | `((info: { props: CascaderProps<DefaultOptionType, string, boolean>; }) => DeepStylesType<{ root?: CSSProperties; prefix?: CSSProperties; ... 7 more ...; popup?: { ...; } | undefined; } | undefined>) | DeepStylesType<...>` | no | - |  |
| suffixIcon | `ReactNode` | no | - |  |
| variant | `enum` | no | "outlined" | @since 5.13.0 |

## Nhật ký thay đổi (Hướng dẫn)

Lịch sử phiên bản của GHN Design System.

## Checkbox (Nhập liệu)

Chọn nhiều mục độc lập trong một nhóm.

Import: `import { Checkbox } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| autoFocus | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| checked | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| className | `string` | no | - |  |
| classNames | `((info: { props: CheckboxProps; }) => DeepClassNameType<{ root?: string; icon?: string; label?: string | undefined; } | undefined>) | DeepClassNameType<...>` | no | - |  |
| defaultChecked | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| disabled | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| id | `string` | no | - |  |
| indeterminate | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| name | `string` | no | - |  |
| onBlur | `FocusEventHandler<HTMLInputElement>` | no | - |  |
| onChange | `((e: CheckboxChangeEvent) => void)` | no | - |  |
| onClick | `MouseEventHandler<HTMLElement>` | no | - |  |
| onFocus | `FocusEventHandler<HTMLInputElement>` | no | - |  |
| onKeyDown | `KeyboardEventHandler<HTMLElement>` | no | - |  |
| onKeyPress | `KeyboardEventHandler<HTMLElement>` | no | - |  |
| onMouseEnter | `MouseEventHandler<HTMLElement>` | no | - |  |
| onMouseLeave | `MouseEventHandler<HTMLElement>` | no | - |  |
| prefixCls | `string` | no | - |  |
| required | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| rootClassName | `string` | no | - |  |
| skipGroup | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| style | `CSSProperties` | no | - |  |
| styles | `((info: { props: CheckboxProps; }) => DeepStylesType<{ root?: CSSProperties; icon?: CSSProperties; label?: CSSProperties | undefined; } | undefined>) | DeepStylesType<...>` | no | - |  |
| tabIndex | `number` | no | - |  |
| title | `string` | no | - |  |
| type | `string` | no | - |  |
| value | `any` | no | - |  |

## Collapse (Hiển thị dữ liệu)

Thu gọn/mở rộng nội dung theo từng mục.

Import: `import { Collapse } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| accordion | `boolean` | no | - | 手风琴效果 |
| activeKey | `string | number | (string | number)[]` | no | - |  |
| bordered | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| children | `ReactNode` | no | - | @deprecated use `items` instead |
| className | `string` | no | - |  |
| classNames | `((info: { props: CollapseProps; }) => DeepClassNameType<{ root?: string; header?: string; title?: string | undefined; body?: string | undefined; icon?: string | undefined; } | undefined>) | DeepClassNameType<...>` | no | - |  |
| collapsible | `enum` | no | - |  |
| defaultActiveKey | `string | number | (string | number)[]` | no | - |  |
| destroyInactivePanel | `boolean` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `destroyOnHidden` instead |
| destroyOnHidden | `boolean` | no | - | @since 5.25.0 |
| expandIcon | `((panelProps: PanelProps) => ReactNode)` | no | - |  |
| expandIconPlacement | `enum` | no | - |  |
| expandIconPosition | `enum` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `expandIconPlacement` instead |
| ghost | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| onChange | `((key: string[]) => void)` | no | - |  |
| prefixCls | `string` | no | - |  |
| rootClassName | `string` | no | - |  |
| size | `enum` | no | - |  |
| style | `CSSProperties` | no | - |  |
| styles | `((info: { props: CollapseProps; }) => DeepStylesType<{ root?: CSSProperties; header?: CSSProperties; title?: CSSProperties | undefined; body?: CSSProperties | undefined; icon?: CSSProperties | undefined; } | undefined>) | DeepStylesType<...>` | no | - |  |

## Color Picker (Nhập liệu)

Chọn màu qua bảng màu và ô nhập HEX.

Import: `import { Color } from 'antd';`

## Màu sắc (Nền tảng)

Cam là màu thương hiệu — điểm nhấn duy nhất; phần còn lại trung tính.

## Command (Bảng lệnh) (Cơ bản)

Bảng lệnh tìm nhanh và thực thi hành động bằng bàn phím.

## Chế độ tối (Nền tảng)

Bảng màu nền tối phái sinh từ cùng seed, giữ thương hiệu.

## Date Picker (Nhập liệu)

Chọn ngày/khoảng ngày qua lịch thả xuống.

Import: `import { Date } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| bordered | `boolean` | no | - | @deprecated Use `variant` instead |
| classNames | `DeepClassNameType<{ root?: string; prefix?: string; input?: string | undefined; suffix?: string | undefined; popup?: string | { root?: string | undefined; header?: string | undefined; ... 4 more ...; container?: string | undefined; } | undefined; } | undefined> | ((info: { ...; }) => DeepClas...` | no | - |  |
| defaultValue | `MultiValueType<ValueType, IsMultiple> | null` | no | - |  |
| dropdownClassName | `string` | no | - | @deprecated `dropdownClassName` is deprecated which will be removed in next major version.Please use `classNames.popup.root` instead. |
| locale | `PickerLocale` | no | - |  |
| multiple | `boolean` | no | - | Not support `time` or `datetime` picker |
| onChange | `((date: MultiValueType<ValueType, IsMultiple> | null, dateString: MultiValueType<string, IsMultiple> | null) => void)` | no | - |  |
| onOk | `((date: MultiValueType<ValueType, IsMultiple>) => void)` | no | - |  |
| placement | `enum` | no | - |  |
| popupClassName | `string` | no | - | @deprecated please use `classNames.popup.root` instead |
| popupStyle | `CSSProperties` | no | - | @deprecated please use `styles.popup.root` instead |
| rootClassName | `string` | no | - |  |
| size | `enum` | no | - |  |
| status | `enum` | no | - |  |
| styles | `DeepStylesType<{ root?: CSSProperties; prefix?: CSSProperties; input?: CSSProperties | undefined; suffix?: CSSProperties | undefined; popup?: { ...; } | undefined; } | undefined> | ((info: { ...; }) => DeepStylesType<...>)` | no | - |  |
| value | `MultiValueType<ValueType, IsMultiple> | null` | no | - |  |
| variant | `enum` | no | "outlined" | @since 5.13.0 |

## Descriptions (Hiển thị dữ liệu)

Bảng cặp nhãn–giá trị mô tả chi tiết.

Import: `import { Descriptions } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| bordered | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| children | `ReactNode` | no | - | @deprecated use `items` instead |
| className | `string` | no | - |  |
| classNames | `DeepClassNameType<{ root?: string; header?: string; title?: string | undefined; extra?: string | undefined; label?: string | undefined; content?: string | undefined; } | undefined> | ((info: { ...; }) => DeepClassNameType<...>)` | no | - |  |
| colon | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| column | `number | Partial<Record<"xxxl" | "xxl" | "xl" | "lg" | "md" | "sm" | "xs", number>>` | no | - |  |
| contentStyle | `CSSProperties` | no | - | @deprecated use `styles.content` instead |
| extra | `ReactNode` | no | - |  |
| id | `string` | no | - |  |
| items | `DescriptionsItemType[]` | no | - |  |
| labelStyle | `CSSProperties` | no | - | @deprecated use `styles.label` instead |
| layout | `enum` | no | - |  |
| prefixCls | `string` | no | - |  |
| rootClassName | `string` | no | - |  |
| size | `enum` | no | - | Note: `default` is deprecated and will be removed in v7, please use `medium` instead. |
| style | `CSSProperties` | no | - |  |
| styles | `DeepStylesType<{ root?: CSSProperties; header?: CSSProperties; title?: CSSProperties | undefined; extra?: CSSProperties | undefined; label?: CSSProperties | undefined; content?: CSSProperties | undefined; } | undefined> | ((info: { ...; }) => DeepStylesType<...>)` | no | - |  |
| title | `ReactNode` | no | - |  |

## Divider (Bố cục)

Đường kẻ phân tách nội dung theo chiều ngang hoặc dọc.

Import: `import { Divider } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| className | `string` | no | - |  |
| classNames | `DeepClassNameType<{ root?: string; rail?: string; content?: string | undefined; } | undefined> | ((info: { props: DividerProps; }) => DeepClassNameType<...>)` | no | - |  |
| dashed | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| orientation | `enum` | no | - |  |
| orientationMargin | `string | number` | no | - | @deprecated please use `styles.content.margin` |
| plain | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| prefixCls | `string` | no | - |  |
| rootClassName | `string` | no | - |  |
| size | `enum` | no | - |  |
| style | `CSSProperties` | no | - |  |
| styles | `DeepStylesType<{ root?: CSSProperties; rail?: CSSProperties; content?: CSSProperties | undefined; } | undefined> | ((info: { ...; }) => DeepStylesType<...>)` | no | - |  |
| titlePlacement | `enum` | no | - |  |
| type | `enum` | no | - | @deprecated please use `orientation` |
| variant | `enum` | no | solid | @since 5.20.0 |
| vertical | `boolean` | no | - |  |

## Drawer (Phản hồi)

Bảng trượt từ cạnh màn hình cho nội dung phụ.

Import: `import { Drawer } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| afterOpenChange | `((open: boolean) => void)` | no | - |  |
| bodyStyle | `CSSProperties` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `styles.body` instead |
| classNames | `DeepClassNameType<{ root?: string; mask?: string; header?: string | undefined; title?: string | undefined; extra?: string | undefined; section?: string | undefined; body?: string | undefined; ... 4 more ...; content?: string | undefined; } | undefined> | ((info: { ...; }) => DeepClassNameType...` | no | - |  |
| closable | `boolean | (ClosableType & AriaAttributes & { placement?: "start" | "end"; })` | no | - | Recommend to use closeIcon instead  e.g.  `<Drawer closeIcon={false} />` |
| closeIcon | `ReactNode` | no | - |  |
| contentWrapperStyle | `CSSProperties` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `styles.wrapper` instead |
| destroyOnClose | `boolean` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `destroyOnHidden` instead |
| destroyOnHidden | `boolean` | no | - | @since 5.25.0 |
| drawerStyle | `CSSProperties` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `styles.content` instead |
| extra | `ReactNode` | no | - |  |
| focusable | `FocusableConfig` | no | - |  |
| footer | `ReactNode` | no | - |  |
| footerStyle | `CSSProperties` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `styles.footer` instead |
| headerStyle | `CSSProperties` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `styles.header` instead |
| loading | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| mask | `MaskType` | no | - |  |
| maskClosable | `boolean` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `mask.closable` instead |
| maskStyle | `CSSProperties` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `styles.mask` instead |
| open | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| resizable | `boolean | DrawerResizableConfig` | no | - |  |
| size | `string | number` | no | - | Size of the drawer (width for left/right placement, height for top/bottom placement) |
| styles | `DeepStylesType<{ root?: CSSProperties; mask?: CSSProperties; header?: CSSProperties | undefined; title?: CSSProperties | undefined; ... 7 more ...; content?: CSSProperties | undefined; } | undefined> | ((info: { ...; }) => DeepStylesType<...>)` | no | - |  |
| title | `ReactNode` | no | - |  |

## Dropdown / Context menu (Điều hướng)

Danh sách hành động hiện từ một điểm kích hoạt.

Import: `import { Dropdown } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| align | `AlignType` | no | - |  |
| arrow | `boolean | DropdownArrowOptions` | no | - |  |
| autoAdjustOverflow | `boolean | AdjustOverflow` | no | - |  |
| autoFocus | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| className | `string` | no | - |  |
| classNames | `DeepClassNameType<{ root?: string; item?: string; itemTitle?: string | undefined; itemIcon?: string | undefined; itemContent?: string | undefined; } | undefined> | ((info: { ...; }) => DeepClassNameType<...>)` | no | - |  |
| destroyOnHidden | `boolean` | no | - | @since 5.25.0 |
| destroyPopupOnHide | `boolean` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `destroyOnHidden` instead |
| disabled | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| dropdownRender | `((originNode: ReactNode) => ReactNode)` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `popupRender` instead |
| forceRender | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| getPopupContainer | `((triggerNode: HTMLElement) => HTMLElement)` | no | - |  |
| menu | `(MenuProps & { activeKey?: string; })` | no | - |  |
| mouseEnterDelay | `number` | no | - |  |
| mouseLeaveDelay | `number` | no | - |  |
| onOpenChange | `((open: boolean, info: { source: "menu" | "trigger"; }) => void)` | no | - |  |
| open | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| openClassName | `string` | no | - |  |
| overlayClassName | `string` | no | - | @deprecated please use `classNames.root` instead. |
| overlayStyle | `CSSProperties` | no | - | @deprecated please use `styles.root` instead. |
| placement | `enum` | no | - |  |
| popupRender | `((originNode: ReactNode) => ReactNode)` | no | - |  |
| prefixCls | `string` | no | - |  |
| rootClassName | `string` | no | - |  |
| styles | `DeepStylesType<{ root?: CSSProperties; item?: CSSProperties; itemTitle?: CSSProperties | undefined; itemIcon?: CSSProperties | undefined; itemContent?: CSSProperties | undefined; } | undefined> | ((info: { ...; }) => DeepStylesType<...>)` | no | - |  |
| transitionName | `string` | no | - |  |
| trigger | `("click" | "hover" | "contextMenu")[]` | no | - |  |

## Đổ bóng (Nền tảng)

Vài cấp đổ bóng nhẹ để phân tầng bề mặt, không lạm dụng.

## Empty (Hiển thị dữ liệu)

Trạng thái rỗng khi không có dữ liệu.

Import: `import { Empty } from 'antd';`

## Flex (Bố cục)

Bố cục linh hoạt theo trục, căn chỉnh và khoảng cách.

Import: `import { Flex } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| align | `AlignItems` | no | - |  |
| component | `CustomComponent<AnyObject>` | no | - |  |
| flex | `Flex<string | number>` | no | - |  |
| gap | `LiteralUnion<SizeType, Gap<string | number>>` | no | - |  |
| justify | `JustifyContent` | no | - |  |
| orientation | `enum` | no | - |  |
| prefixCls | `string` | no | - |  |
| rootClassName | `string` | no | - |  |
| vertical | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| wrap | `boolean | FlexWrap` | no | - |  |

## Float Button (Cơ bản)

Nút nổi cố định góc màn hình cho hành động nhanh.

## Form (Nhập liệu)

Bố cục nhãn–trường nhất quán kèm kiểm tra hợp lệ.

Import: `import { Form } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| focusField | `(name: any) => void` | yes | - |  |
| getFieldInstance | `(name: any) => any` | yes | - |  |
| scrollToField | `(name: any, options?: ScrollFocusOptions | undefined) => void` | yes | - |  |

## Bắt đầu (Hướng dẫn)

Cách dùng hệ thống cho Designer, Developer và PM.

## Grid (Row/Col) (Bố cục)

Hệ lưới 24 cột responsive cho bố cục trang.

Import: `import { Grid } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| flex | `FlexType` | no | - |  |
| lg | `ColSpanType | ColSize` | no | - |  |
| md | `ColSpanType | ColSize` | no | - |  |
| offset | `ColSpanType` | no | - |  |
| order | `ColSpanType` | no | - |  |
| prefixCls | `string` | no | - |  |
| pull | `ColSpanType` | no | - |  |
| push | `ColSpanType` | no | - |  |
| sm | `ColSpanType | ColSize` | no | - |  |
| span | `ColSpanType` | no | - |  |
| xl | `ColSpanType | ColSize` | no | - |  |
| xs | `ColSpanType | ColSize` | no | - |  |
| xxl | `ColSpanType | ColSize` | no | - |  |
| xxxl | `ColSpanType | ColSize` | no | - |  |

## Biểu tượng (Nền tảng)

Bộ icon FontAwesome 6 Pro, đồng bộ cỡ và màu theo token.

## Image (Hiển thị dữ liệu)

Hiển thị ảnh có xem phóng to và dự phòng.

## Giới thiệu (Tổng quan)

Ngôn ngữ thiết kế dùng chung để xây sản phẩm GHN nhất quán, dễ tiếp cận.

## Input Number (Nhập liệu)

Nhập số có nút tăng/giảm và bước nhảy.

Import: `import { Input } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| addonAfter | `ReactNode` | no | - | @deprecated Use `Space.Compact` instead. @example ```tsx import { Space, InputNumber } from 'antd';  <Space.Compact>   <InputNumber defaultValue={1} />   {addon} </Space.Compact> ``` |
| addonBefore | `ReactNode` | no | - | @deprecated Use `Space.Compact` instead. @example ```tsx import { Space, InputNumber } from 'antd';  <Space.Compact>   {addon}   <InputNumber defaultValue={1} /> </Space.Compact> ``` |
| bordered | `boolean` | no | - | @deprecated Use `variant` instead. |
| classNames | `((info: { props: InputNumberProps<ValueType>; }) => DeepClassNameType<{ root?: string; prefix?: string; suffix?: string | undefined; input?: string | undefined; actions?: string | undefined; } | undefined>) | DeepClassNameType<...>` | no | - |  |
| controls | `boolean | { upIcon?: ReactNode; downIcon?: ReactNode; }` | no | - |  |
| disabled | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| prefix | `ReactNode` | no | - |  |
| prefixCls | `string` | no | - |  |
| rootClassName | `string` | no | - |  |
| size | `enum` | no | - |  |
| status | `enum` | no | - |  |
| styles | `((info: { props: InputNumberProps<ValueType>; }) => DeepStylesType<{ root?: CSSProperties; prefix?: CSSProperties; suffix?: CSSProperties | undefined; input?: CSSProperties | undefined; actions?: CSSProperties | undefined; } | undefined>) | DeepStylesType<...>` | no | - |  |
| suffix | `ReactNode` | no | - |  |
| variant | `enum` | no | "outlined" | @since 5.13.0 |

## Input (Nhập liệu)

Ô nhập liệu một dòng kèm nhãn và trợ giúp.

Import: `import { Input } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| addonAfter | `ReactNode` | no | - | @deprecated Use `Space.Compact` instead. @example ```tsx import { Space, Input } from 'antd';  <Space.Compact>   <Input defaultValue="name" />   {addon} </Space.Compact> ``` |
| addonBefore | `ReactNode` | no | - | @deprecated Use `Space.Compact` instead. @example ```tsx import { Space, Input } from 'antd';  <Space.Compact>   {addon}   <Input defaultValue="name" /> </Space.Compact> ``` |
| bordered | `boolean` | no | - | @deprecated Use `variant="borderless"` instead. |
| classNames | `((info: { props: InputProps; }) => DeepClassNameType<{ root?: string; prefix?: string; suffix?: string | undefined; clear?: string | undefined; input?: string | undefined; count?: string | undefined; } | undefined>) | DeepClassNameType<...>` | no | - |  |
| disabled | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| rootClassName | `string` | no | - |  |
| size | `enum` | no | - |  |
| status | `enum` | no | - |  |
| styles | `((info: { props: InputProps; }) => DeepStylesType<{ root?: CSSProperties; prefix?: CSSProperties; suffix?: CSSProperties | undefined; clear?: CSSProperties | undefined; input?: CSSProperties | undefined; count?: CSSProperties | undefined; } | undefined>) | DeepStylesType<...>` | no | - |  |
| variant | `enum` | no | "outlined" | @since 5.13.0 |

## Trạng thái tương tác (Nền tảng)

Ma trận hover/focus/active/disabled/loading nhất quán.

## Layout (Bố cục)

Khung bố cục trang: Header, Sider, Content, Footer.

Import: `import { Layout } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| hasSider | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| prefixCls | `string` | no | - |  |
| rootClassName | `string` | no | - |  |
| suffixCls | `string` | no | - |  |

## List (Hiển thị dữ liệu)

Danh sách mục đồng nhất, có thể kèm thao tác.

## Mentions (Nhập liệu)

Gắn thẻ người dùng bằng ký tự @ trong văn bản.

Import: `import { Mentions } from 'antd';`

## Menu (Điều hướng)

Điều hướng chính dọc/ngang, có cấp con.

Import: `import { Menu } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| classNames | `MenuClassNamesType` | no | - |  |
| collapsedWidth | `string | number` | no | - |  |
| inlineIndent | `number` | no | - |  |
| items | `ItemType[]` | no | - |  |
| siderCollapsed | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| styles | `MenuStylesType` | no | - |  |
| theme | `enum` | no | - |  |
| tooltip | `false | TooltipProps` | no | - |  |

## Message (Phản hồi)

Thông báo nhẹ ở đỉnh màn hình, tự ẩn.

## Modal (Phản hồi)

Hộp thoại chặn nền để tập trung một tác vụ.

Import: `import { Modal } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| afterClose | `(() => void)` | no | - |  |
| afterOpenChange | `((open: boolean) => void)` | no | - | Callback when the animation ends when Modal is turned on and off |
| bodyStyle | `CSSProperties` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `styles.body` instead |
| cancelButtonProps | `ButtonProps` | no | - |  |
| cancelText | `ReactNode` | no | - | Text of the Cancel button |
| centered | `boolean` | no | - | Centered Modal |
| className | `string` | no | - |  |
| classNames | `((info: { props: ModalProps; }) => DeepClassNameType<{ root?: string; header?: string; body?: string | undefined; footer?: string | undefined; container?: string | undefined; title?: string | undefined; wrapper?: string | undefined; mask?: string | undefined; close?: string | undefined; } | u...` | no | - |  |
| closable | `boolean | (ClosableType & AriaAttributes & { onClose?: (() => void); afterClose?: (() => void); }) | undefined` | no | - |  |
| closeIcon | `ReactNode` | no | - |  |
| confirmLoading | `boolean` | no | - | Whether to apply loading visual effect for OK button or not |
| destroyOnClose | `boolean` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `destroyOnHidden` instead |
| destroyOnHidden | `boolean` | no | - | @since 5.25.0 |
| focusable | `FocusableConfig` | no | - |  |
| focusTriggerAfterClose | `boolean` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `focusable.focusTriggerAfterClose` instead |
| footer | `ReactNode | ((originNode: ReactNode, extra: { OkBtn: FC<{}>; CancelBtn: FC<{}>; }) => ReactNode)` | no | - |  |
| forceRender | `boolean` | no | - | Force render Modal |
| getContainer | `string | false | HTMLElement | getContainerFunc` | no | - |  |
| keyboard | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| loading | `boolean` | no | - | @since 5.18.0 |
| mask | `MaskType` | no | - |  |
| maskClosable | `boolean` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `mask.closable` instead @description Whether to close the modal dialog when the mask (area outside the modal) is clicked |
| maskStyle | `CSSProperties` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `styles.mask` instead |
| maskTransitionName | `string` | no | - |  |
| modalRender | `((node: ReactNode) => ReactNode)` | no | - |  |
| mousePosition | `MousePosition` | no | - |  |
| okButtonProps | `ButtonProps` | no | - |  |
| okText | `ReactNode` | no | - | Text of the OK button |
| okType | `enum` | no | - | Button `type` of the OK button |
| onCancel | `((e: MouseEvent<HTMLButtonElement, MouseEvent> | KeyboardEvent<HTMLElement>) => void)` | no | - | Specify a function that will be called when a user clicks mask, close button on top right or Cancel button, or presses Esc key |
| onOk | `((e: MouseEvent<HTMLButtonElement, MouseEvent>) => void)` | no | - | Specify a function that will be called when a user clicks the OK button |
| open | `boolean` | no | - | Whether the modal dialog is visible or not |
| prefixCls | `string` | no | - |  |
| rootClassName | `string` | no | - |  |
| rootStyle | `CSSProperties` | no | - |  |
| style | `CSSProperties` | no | - |  |
| styles | `((info: { props: ModalProps; }) => DeepStylesType<{ root?: CSSProperties; header?: CSSProperties; body?: CSSProperties | undefined; ... 5 more ...; close?: CSSProperties | undefined; } | undefined>) | DeepStylesType<...>` | no | - |  |
| title | `ReactNode` | no | - | The modal dialog's title |
| transitionName | `string` | no | - |  |
| width | `string | number | Partial<Record<"xxxl" | "xxl" | "xl" | "lg" | "md" | "sm" | "xs", string | number>>` | no | - | Width of the modal dialog |
| wrapClassName | `string` | no | - |  |
| wrapProps | `any` | no | - |  |
| zIndex | `number` | no | - |  |

## Chuyển động (Nền tảng)

Thời lượng và đường cong chuyển động nhất quán, tinh tế.

## Notification (Phản hồi)

Thông báo nổi ở góc, tự ẩn sau vài giây.

## Độ mờ (Nền tảng)

Các mức độ mờ chuẩn cho disabled, overlay và văn bản phụ.

## Pagination (Điều hướng)

Chia dữ liệu dài thành nhiều trang.

Import: `import { Pagination } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| classNames | `((info: { props: PaginationProps; }) => DeepClassNameType<{ root?: string; item?: string; } | undefined>) | DeepClassNameType<{ root?: string | undefined; item?: string | undefined; } | undefined>` | no | - |  |
| pageSizeOptions | `(string | number)[]` | no | - | `string` type will be removed in next major version. |
| responsive | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| role | `string` | no | - |  |
| rootClassName | `string` | no | - |  |
| selectComponentClass | `any` | no | - | @deprecated Not official support. Will be removed in next major version. |
| showQuickJumper | `boolean | { goButton?: ReactNode; }` | no | - |  |
| showSizeChanger | `boolean | SelectProps<any, DefaultOptionType>` | no | - |  |
| size | `enum` | no | - |  |
| styles | `((info: { props: PaginationProps; }) => DeepStylesType<{ root?: CSSProperties; item?: CSSProperties; } | undefined>) | DeepStylesType<...>` | no | - |  |
| totalBoundaryShowSizeChanger | `number` | no | - |  |

## Popconfirm (Phản hồi)

Hỏi xác nhận nhanh ngay tại điểm thao tác.

## Popover (Hiển thị dữ liệu)

Khung nổi chứa nội dung phong phú khi click/hover.

## Progress (Phản hồi)

Cho biết tiến độ của một tác vụ.

Import: `import { Progress } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| className | `string` | no | - |  |
| classNames | `((info: { props: ProgressProps; }) => DeepClassNameType<{ root?: string; body?: string; rail?: string | undefined; track?: string | undefined; indicator?: string | undefined; } | undefined>) | DeepClassNameType<...>` | no | - |  |
| format | `((percent?: number, successPercent?: number) => ReactNode) | undefined` | no | - |  |
| gapDegree | `number` | no | - |  |
| gapPlacement | `enum` | no | - |  |
| gapPosition | `enum` | no | - | @deprecated please use `gapPlacement` instead |
| percent | `number` | no | - |  |
| percentPosition | `PercentPositionType` | no | - |  |
| prefixCls | `string` | no | - |  |
| railColor | `string` | no | - |  |
| rootClassName | `string` | no | - |  |
| rounding | `((step: number) => number)` | no | - |  |
| showInfo | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| size | `number | [string | number, number] | ProgressSize | { width?: number; height?: number; }` | no | - |  |
| status | `enum` | no | - |  |
| steps | `number | { count: number; gap: number; }` | no | - |  |
| strokeColor | `string | string[] | ProgressGradient` | no | - |  |
| strokeLinecap | `enum` | no | - |  |
| strokeWidth | `number` | no | - |  |
| style | `CSSProperties` | no | - |  |
| styles | `((info: { props: ProgressProps; }) => DeepStylesType<{ root?: CSSProperties; body?: CSSProperties; rail?: CSSProperties | undefined; track?: CSSProperties | undefined; indicator?: CSSProperties | undefined; } | undefined>) | DeepStylesType<...>` | no | - |  |
| success | `SuccessProps` | no | - |  |
| trailColor | `string` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `railColor` instead |
| type | `enum` | no | - |  |
| width | `number` | no | - | @deprecated Use `size` instead |

## QR Code (Hiển thị dữ liệu)

Mã QR cho liên kết hoặc dữ liệu, có logo giữa.

Import: `import { QR } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| bordered | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| className | `string` | no | - |  |
| classNames | `((info: { props: QRCodeProps; }) => DeepClassNameType<{ root?: string; cover?: string; } | undefined>) | DeepClassNameType<{ root?: string | undefined; cover?: string | undefined; } | undefined>` | no | - |  |
| errorLevel | `enum` | no | - |  |
| icon | `string` | no | - |  |
| iconSize | `number | { width: number; height: number; }` | no | - |  |
| onRefresh | `(() => void)` | no | - |  |
| prefixCls | `string` | no | - |  |
| rootClassName | `string` | no | - |  |
| status | `enum` | no | - |  |
| statusRender | `((info: StatusRenderInfo) => ReactNode)` | no | - |  |
| styles | `((info: { props: QRCodeProps; }) => DeepStylesType<{ root?: CSSProperties; cover?: CSSProperties; } | undefined>) | DeepStylesType<...>` | no | - |  |
| type | `enum` | no | - |  |

## Radio (Nhập liệu)

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| autoFocus | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| checked | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| className | `string` | no | - |  |
| classNames | `((info: { props: RadioProps; }) => DeepClassNameType<{ root?: string; icon?: string; label?: string | undefined; } | undefined>) | DeepClassNameType<...>` | no | - |  |
| defaultChecked | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| disabled | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| id | `string` | no | - |  |
| name | `string` | no | - |  |
| onBlur | `FocusEventHandler<HTMLInputElement>` | no | - |  |
| onChange | `((e: RadioChangeEvent) => void)` | no | - |  |
| onClick | `MouseEventHandler<HTMLElement>` | no | - |  |
| onFocus | `FocusEventHandler<HTMLInputElement>` | no | - |  |
| onKeyDown | `KeyboardEventHandler<HTMLElement>` | no | - |  |
| onKeyPress | `KeyboardEventHandler<HTMLElement>` | no | - |  |
| onMouseEnter | `MouseEventHandler<HTMLElement>` | no | - |  |
| onMouseLeave | `MouseEventHandler<HTMLElement>` | no | - |  |
| optionType | `enum` | no | 'default' | Control the appearance for Radio to display as button or not @internal |
| prefixCls | `string` | no | - |  |
| required | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| rootClassName | `string` | no | - |  |
| skipGroup | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| style | `CSSProperties` | no | - |  |
| styles | `((info: { props: RadioProps; }) => DeepStylesType<{ root?: CSSProperties; icon?: CSSProperties; label?: CSSProperties | undefined; } | undefined>) | DeepStylesType<...>` | no | - |  |
| tabIndex | `number` | no | - |  |
| title | `string` | no | - |  |
| type | `string` | no | - |  |
| value | `any` | no | - |  |

## Rate (Nhập liệu)

Chấm điểm bằng dãy biểu tượng sao.

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| rootClassName | `string` | no | - |  |
| size | `enum` | no | - |  |
| tooltips | `(string | TooltipProps)[]` | no | - |  |

## Result (Phản hồi)

Trang kết quả sau một tác vụ (thành công/lỗi).

Import: `import { Result } from 'antd';`

## Segmented (Hiển thị dữ liệu)

Bộ chọn phân đoạn cho 2–5 lựa chọn loại trừ.

Import: `import { Segmented } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| block | `boolean` | no | - | Option to fit width to its parent's width |
| classNames | `((info: { props: SegmentedProps<SegmentedValue>; }) => DeepClassNameType<{ root?: string; icon?: string; label?: string | undefined; item?: string | undefined; } | undefined>) | DeepClassNameType<...>` | no | - |  |
| options | `SegmentedOptions<ValueType>` | yes | - |  |
| orientation | `enum` | no | - |  |
| rootClassName | `string` | no | - |  |
| shape | `enum` | no | - |  |
| size | `enum` | no | - | Option to control the display size |
| styles | `((info: { props: SegmentedProps<SegmentedValue>; }) => DeepStylesType<{ root?: CSSProperties; icon?: CSSProperties; label?: CSSProperties | undefined; item?: CSSProperties | undefined; } | undefined>) | DeepStylesType<...>` | no | - |  |
| vertical | `boolean` | no | - |  |

## Select (Nhập liệu)

Chọn một hoặc nhiều giá trị, hỗ trợ thẻ gỡ.

Import: `import { Select } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| bordered | `boolean` | no | - | @deprecated Use `variant` instead. |
| classNames | `((info: { props: SelectProps<any, DefaultOptionType>; }) => DeepClassNameType<{ root?: string; prefix?: string; suffix?: string | undefined; ... 7 more ...; popup?: { ...; } | undefined; } | undefined>) | DeepClassNameType<...>` | no | - |  |
| disabled | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| dropdownClassName | `string` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `classNames.popup.root` instead |
| dropdownMatchSelectWidth | `number | boolean` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `popupMatchSelectWidth` instead |
| dropdownRender | `((menu: ReactElement<unknown, string | JSXElementConstructor<any>>) => ReactElement<unknown, string | JSXElementConstructor<any>>)` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `popupRender` instead |
| dropdownStyle | `CSSProperties` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `styles.popup` instead |
| loadingIcon | `ReactNode` | no | - |  |
| mode | `enum` | no | - |  |
| onDropdownVisibleChange | `((open: boolean) => void)` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `onOpenChange` instead |
| onOpenChange | `((visible: boolean) => void)` | no | - |  |
| placement | `enum` | no | - |  |
| popupClassName | `string` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `classNames.popup.root` instead |
| popupMatchSelectWidth | `number | boolean` | no | - |  |
| prefix | `ReactNode` | no | - |  |
| rootClassName | `string` | no | - |  |
| showArrow | `boolean` | no | - | @deprecated `showArrow` is deprecated which will be removed in next major version. It will be a default behavior, you can hide it by setting `suffixIcon` to null. |
| showSearch | `boolean | (SearchConfig<OptionType> & { searchIcon?: ReactNode; })` | no | - |  |
| size | `enum` | no | - |  |
| status | `enum` | no | - |  |
| styles | `((info: { props: SelectProps<any, DefaultOptionType>; }) => DeepStylesType<{ root?: CSSProperties; prefix?: CSSProperties; ... 8 more ...; popup?: { ...; } | undefined; } | undefined>) | DeepStylesType<...>` | no | - |  |
| suffixIcon | `ReactNode` | no | - |  |
| variant | `enum` | no | "outlined" | @since 5.13.0 |

## Space (Bố cục)

Khoảng cách đều giữa các phần tử liền kề.

## Khoảng cách & Bo góc (Nền tảng)

Lưới 4px và bo góc mặc định 8px tạo nhịp điệu nhất quán.

## Spin (Phản hồi)

Vòng xoay báo đang tải.

## Splitter (Bố cục)

Chia vùng thành các ô kéo giãn được.

Import: `import { Splitter } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| className | `string` | no | - |  |
| classNames | `DeepClassNameType<{ root?: string; panel?: string; dragger?: string | { default?: string | undefined; active?: string | undefined; } | undefined; } | undefined> | ((info: { ...; }) => DeepClassNameType<...>)` | no | - |  |
| collapsible | `{ motion?: boolean; icon?: { start?: ReactNode; end?: ReactNode; }; } | undefined` | no | - | Collapse configuration. Set `motion: true` to enable collapse animation (duration follows Component Token). |
| collapsibleIcon | `{ start?: ReactNode; end?: ReactNode; }` | no | - | @deprecated please use `collapsible.icon` |
| destroyOnHidden | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| draggerIcon | `ReactNode` | no | - |  |
| layout | `enum` | no | horizontal | @deprecated please use `orientation` |
| lazy | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| onCollapse | `((collapsed: boolean[], sizes: number[]) => void)` | no | - |  |
| onDraggerDoubleClick | `((index: number) => void)` | no | - |  |
| onResize | `((sizes: number[]) => void)` | no | - |  |
| onResizeEnd | `((sizes: number[]) => void)` | no | - |  |
| onResizeStart | `((sizes: number[]) => void)` | no | - |  |
| orientation | `enum` | no | - |  |
| prefixCls | `string` | no | - |  |
| rootClassName | `string` | no | - |  |
| style | `CSSProperties` | no | - |  |
| styles | `DeepStylesType<{ root?: CSSProperties; panel?: CSSProperties; dragger?: { default?: CSSProperties | undefined; active?: CSSProperties | undefined; } | undefined; } | undefined> | ((info: { ...; }) => DeepStylesType<...>)` | no | - |  |
| vertical | `boolean` | no | - |  |

## Steps (Điều hướng)

Hiển thị tiến trình qua các bước tuần tự.

Import: `import { Steps } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| className | `string` | no | - |  |
| classNames | `DeepClassNameType<{ root?: string; item?: string; itemWrapper?: string | undefined; itemIcon?: string | undefined; itemSection?: string | undefined; itemHeader?: string | undefined; itemTitle?: string | undefined; itemSubtitle?: string | undefined; itemContent?: string | undefined; itemRail?:...` | no | - |  |
| current | `number` | no | - |  |
| direction | `enum` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `orientation` instead. |
| ellipsis | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| iconRender | `IconRenderType` | no | - |  |
| initial | `number` | no | - |  |
| items | `StepItem[]` | no | - |  |
| labelPlacement | `enum` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `titlePlacement` instead. |
| offset | `number` | no | - | Set offset cell, only work when `type` is `inline`. |
| onChange | `((current: number) => void)` | no | - |  |
| orientation | `enum` | no | - |  |
| percent | `number` | no | - |  |
| prefixCls | `string` | no | - |  |
| progressDot | `boolean | ProgressDotRender` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `type` and `iconRender` instead. |
| responsive | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| rootClassName | `string` | no | - |  |
| size | `enum` | no | - | Note: `default` is deprecated and will be removed in v7, please use `medium` instead. |
| status | `enum` | no | - |  |
| style | `CSSProperties` | no | - |  |
| styles | `DeepStylesType<{ root?: CSSProperties; item?: CSSProperties; itemWrapper?: CSSProperties | undefined; itemIcon?: CSSProperties | undefined; ... 5 more ...; itemRail?: CSSProperties | undefined; } | undefined> | ((info: { ...; }) => DeepStylesType<...>)` | no | - |  |
| titlePlacement | `enum` | no | - |  |
| type | `enum` | no | - |  |
| variant | `enum` | no | - |  |

## Switch (Nhập liệu)

Bật/tắt tức thì, áp dụng ngay không cần xác nhận.

## Table (Hiển thị dữ liệu)

Trình bày dữ liệu hàng–cột, sắp xếp, phân trang.

Import: `import { Table } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| bordered | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| classNames | `DeepClassNameType<{ root?: string; section?: string; title?: string | undefined; footer?: string | undefined; body?: ComponentsSemanticClassNames | undefined; content?: string | undefined; header?: ComponentsSemanticClassNames | undefined; pagination?: { ...; } | undefined; } | undefined> | (...` | no | - |  |
| column | `Partial<ColumnType<RecordType>>` | no | - |  |
| columns | `ColumnsType<RecordType>` | no | - |  |
| dataSource | `readonly RecordType[]` | no | - |  |
| dropdownPrefixCls | `string` | no | - |  |
| getPopupContainer | `GetPopupContainer` | no | - |  |
| loading | `boolean | SpinProps` | no | - |  |
| locale | `TableLocale` | no | - |  |
| onChange | `((pagination: TablePaginationConfig, filters: Record<string, FilterValue | null>, sorter: SorterResult<RecordType> | SorterResult<...>[], extra: TableCurrentDataSource<...>) => void)` | no | - |  |
| pagination | `false | TablePaginationConfig` | no | - |  |
| rootClassName | `string` | no | - |  |
| rowSelection | `TableRowSelection<RecordType>` | no | - |  |
| scroll | `({ x?: string | number | true; y?: string | number; } & { scrollToFirstRowOnChange?: boolean | undefined; }) | undefined` | no | - |  |
| showSorterTooltip | `boolean | SorterTooltipProps` | no | - |  |
| size | `enum` | no | - |  |
| sortDirections | `SortOrder[]` | no | - |  |
| styles | `DeepStylesType<{ root?: CSSProperties; section?: CSSProperties; title?: CSSProperties | undefined; footer?: CSSProperties | undefined; body?: ComponentsSemanticStyles | undefined; content?: CSSProperties | undefined; header?: ComponentsSemanticStyles | undefined; pagination?: { ...; } | undef...` | no | - |  |
| virtual | `boolean` | no | - |  |

## Tabs (Hiển thị dữ liệu)

Chuyển giữa các nhóm nội dung cùng cấp.

## Tag / Chips (Hiển thị dữ liệu)

Nhãn nhỏ phân loại, lọc hoặc gắn trạng thái.

## Time Picker (Nhập liệu)

Chọn giờ/phút/giây qua cột cuộn.

Import: `import { Time } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| addon | `(() => ReactNode)` | no | - |  |
| bordered | `boolean` | no | - | @deprecated Use `variant` instead |
| classNames | `((info: { props: TimePickerProps; }) => DeepClassNameType<{ root?: string; prefix?: string; input?: string | undefined; suffix?: string | undefined; popup?: string | ... 1 more ... | undefined; } | undefined>) | DeepClassNameType<...>` | no | - |  |
| defaultValue | `Dayjs | null` | no | - |  |
| dropdownClassName | `string` | no | - | @deprecated `dropdownClassName` is deprecated which will be removed in next major version.Please use `classNames.popup.root` instead. |
| locale | `PickerLocale` | no | - |  |
| multiple | `false` | no | - | Not support `time` or `datetime` picker |
| onChange | `((date: Dayjs | null, dateString: string | null) => void)` | no | - |  |
| onOk | `((date: Dayjs) => void)` | no | - |  |
| onSelect | `((value: Dayjs) => void)` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `onCalendarChange` instead |
| placement | `enum` | no | - |  |
| popupClassName | `string` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `classNames.popup` instead |
| popupStyle | `CSSProperties` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `styles.popup` instead |
| rootClassName | `string` | no | - |  |
| size | `enum` | no | - |  |
| status | `enum` | no | - |  |
| styles | `((info: { props: TimePickerProps; }) => DeepStylesType<{ root?: CSSProperties; prefix?: CSSProperties; input?: CSSProperties | undefined; suffix?: CSSProperties | undefined; popup?: { ...; } | undefined; } | undefined>) | DeepStylesType<...>` | no | - |  |
| value | `Dayjs | null` | no | - |  |
| variant | `enum` | no | "outlined" | @since 5.13.0 |

## Timeline (Hiển thị dữ liệu)

Dòng thời gian các sự kiện theo thứ tự.

## Tooltip (Hiển thị dữ liệu)

Chú thích ngắn khi hover/focus.

## Tour (Phản hồi)

Hướng dẫn từng bước làm nổi bật phần tử.

Import: `import { Tour } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| actionsRender | `((originNode: ReactNode, info: { current: number; total: number; }) => ReactNode)` | no | - |  |
| className | `string` | no | - |  |
| classNames | `((info: { props: TourProps; }) => DeepClassNameType<{ root?: string; cover?: string; close?: string | undefined; mask?: string | undefined; section?: string | undefined; ... 6 more ...; description?: string | undefined; } | undefined>) | DeepClassNameType<...>` | no | - |  |
| current | `number` | no | - |  |
| indicatorsRender | `((current: number, total: number) => ReactNode)` | no | - |  |
| keyboard | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| prefixCls | `string` | no | - |  |
| steps | `TourStepProps[]` | no | - |  |
| style | `CSSProperties` | no | - |  |
| styles | `((info: { props: TourProps; }) => DeepStylesType<{ root?: CSSProperties; cover?: CSSProperties; close?: CSSProperties | undefined; ... 8 more ...; description?: CSSProperties | undefined; } | undefined>) | DeepStylesType<...>` | no | - |  |
| type | `enum` | no | - |  |

## Transfer (Nhập liệu)

Chuyển mục giữa hai danh sách nguồn–đích.

Import: `import { Transfer } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| actions | `ReactNode[]` | no | - |  |
| className | `string` | no | - |  |
| classNames | `((info: { props: TransferProps<any>; }) => DeepClassNameType<{ root?: string; section?: string; header?: string | undefined; title?: string | undefined; body?: string | undefined; ... 7 more ...; target?: TransferSectionSemanticClassNames | undefined; } | undefined>) | DeepClassNameType<...>` | no | - |  |
| dataSource | `RecordType[]` | no | - |  |
| disabled | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| filterOption | `((inputValue: string, item: RecordType, direction: TransferDirection) => boolean)` | no | - |  |
| footer | `((props: TransferListProps<RecordType>, info?: { direction: TransferDirection; }) => ReactNode)` | no | - |  |
| listStyle | `CSSProperties | ((style: ListStyle) => CSSProperties)` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `styles.section` instead. |
| locale | `Partial<TransferLocale>` | no | - |  |
| onChange | `((targetKeys: Key[], direction: TransferDirection, moveKeys: Key[]) => void)` | no | - |  |
| oneWay | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| onScroll | `((direction: TransferDirection, e: SyntheticEvent<HTMLUListElement, Event>) => void)` | no | - |  |
| onSearch | `((direction: TransferDirection, value: string) => void)` | no | - |  |
| onSelectChange | `((sourceSelectedKeys: Key[], targetSelectedKeys: Key[]) => void)` | no | - |  |
| operations | `string[]` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `actions` instead. |
| operationStyle | `CSSProperties` | no | - | @deprecated Please use `styles.actions` instead. |
| pagination | `PaginationType` | no | - |  |
| prefixCls | `string` | no | - |  |
| render | `TransferRender<RecordType>` | no | - |  |
| rootClassName | `string` | no | - |  |
| rowKey | `((record: RecordType) => Key)` | no | - |  |
| selectAllLabels | `SelectAllLabel[]` | no | - |  |
| selectedKeys | `Key[]` | no | - |  |
| selectionsIcon | `ReactNode` | no | - |  |
| showSearch | `boolean | TransferSearchOption` | no | - |  |
| showSelectAll | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| status | `enum` | no | - |  |
| style | `CSSProperties` | no | - |  |
| styles | `((info: { props: TransferProps<any>; }) => DeepStylesType<{ root?: CSSProperties; section?: CSSProperties; header?: CSSProperties | undefined; ... 9 more ...; target?: TransferSectionSemanticStyles | undefined; } | undefined>) | DeepStylesType<...>` | no | - |  |
| targetKeys | `Key[]` | no | - |  |
| titles | `ReactNode[]` | no | - |  |

## TreeSelect (Nhập liệu)

Chọn giá trị từ cây phân cấp trong dropdown.

Import: `import { TreeSelect } from 'antd';`

## Tree (Hiển thị dữ liệu)

Cấu trúc cây phân cấp, mở rộng và chọn.

Import: `import { Tree } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| autoExpandParent | `boolean` | no | - | Whether to automatically expand the parent node |
| blockNode | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| checkable | `boolean` | no | - | Whether to support selection |
| checkedKeys | `Key[] | { checked: Key[]; halfChecked: Key[]; }` | no | - | (Controlled) Tree node with checked checkbox |
| checkStrictly | `boolean` | no | - | Node selection in Checkable state is fully controlled (the selected state of parent and child nodes is no longer associated) |
| className | `string` | no | - |  |
| classNames | `((info: { props: TreeProps<DataNode>; }) => DeepClassNameType<{ root?: string; item?: string; itemIcon?: string | undefined; itemTitle?: string | undefined; itemSwitcher?: string | undefined; } | undefined>) | DeepClassNameType<...>` | no | - |  |
| defaultCheckedKeys | `Key[]` | no | - | Tree node with checkbox checked by default |
| defaultExpandAll | `boolean` | no | - | Expand all tree nodes by default |
| defaultExpandedKeys | `Key[]` | no | - | Expand the specified tree node by default |
| defaultExpandParent | `boolean` | no | - | Expand the corresponding tree node by default |
| defaultSelectedKeys | `Key[]` | no | - | Tree node selected by default |
| disabled | `boolean` | no | - | whether to disable the tree |
| draggable | `boolean | DraggableFn | DraggableConfig` | no | - | Set the node to be draggable (IE>8) |
| expandedKeys | `Key[]` | no | - | (Controlled) Expand the specified tree node |
| filterAntTreeNode | `((node: AntTreeNode) => boolean)` | no | - | Click on the tree node to trigger |
| icon | `TreeIcon` | no | - |  |
| loadedKeys | `Key[]` | no | - |  |
| multiple | `boolean` | no | - | Whether to support multiple selection |
| prefixCls | `string` | no | - |  |
| selectable | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| selectedKeys | `Key[]` | no | - | (Controlled) Set the selected tree node |
| showIcon | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| showLine | `boolean | { showLeafIcon: TreeLeafIcon; }` | no | - |  |
| style | `CSSProperties` | no | - |  |
| styles | `((info: { props: TreeProps<DataNode>; }) => DeepStylesType<{ root?: CSSProperties; item?: CSSProperties; itemIcon?: CSSProperties | undefined; itemTitle?: CSSProperties | undefined; itemSwitcher?: CSSProperties | undefined; } | undefined>) | DeepStylesType<...>` | no | - |  |
| switcherIcon | `SwitcherIcon` | no | - |  |
| switcherLoadingIcon | `ReactNode` | no | - |  |

## Kiểu chữ (Nền tảng)

Inter là phông chữ duy nhất, thang cỡ rõ ràng và dễ đọc.

Import: `import { Kiểu } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| aria-label | `string` | no | - | Defines a string value that labels the current element. |
| className | `string` | no | - |  |
| classNames | `((info: { props: BaseTypographyProps; }) => DeepClassNameType<{ root?: string; actions?: string; action?: string | undefined; textarea?: string | undefined; } | undefined>) | DeepClassNameType<...>` | no | - |  |
| component | `enum` | no | - | @internal |
| direction | `enum` | no | - |  |
| id | `string` | no | - |  |
| prefixCls | `string` | no | - |  |
| rootClassName | `string` | no | - |  |
| style | `CSSProperties` | no | - |  |
| styles | `((info: { props: BaseTypographyProps; }) => DeepStylesType<{ root?: CSSProperties; actions?: CSSProperties; action?: CSSProperties | undefined; textarea?: CSSProperties | undefined; } | undefined>) | DeepStylesType<...>` | no | - |  |

## Upload (Nhập liệu)

Tải tệp qua nút chọn hoặc kéo–thả.

Import: `import { Upload } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| accept | `string | AcceptConfig` | no | - |  |
| action | `string | ((file: RcFile) => string) | ((file: RcFile) => PromiseLike<string>)` | no | - |  |
| beforeUpload | `((file: RcFile, fileList: RcFile[]) => BeforeUploadValueType | Promise<BeforeUploadValueType>)` | no | - |  |
| className | `string` | no | - |  |
| classNames | `DeepClassNameType<{ root?: string; list?: string; item?: string | undefined; trigger?: string | undefined; } | undefined> | ((info: { props: UploadProps<...>; }) => DeepClassNameType<...>)` | no | - |  |
| customRequest | `((options: UploadRequestOption<any>, info: { defaultRequest: (option: UploadRequestOption<any>) => void; }) => void)` | no | - |  |
| data | `Record<string, unknown> | ((file: UploadFile<any>) => Record<string, unknown> | Promise<Record<string, unknown>>)` | no | - |  |
| defaultFileList | `UploadFile<any>[]` | no | - |  |
| directory | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| disabled | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| fileList | `UploadFile<any>[]` | no | - |  |
| headers | `HttpRequestHeader` | no | - |  |
| iconRender | `((file: UploadFile<any>, listType?: UploadListType) => ReactNode)` | no | - |  |
| id | `string` | no | - |  |
| isImageUrl | `((file: UploadFile<any>) => boolean)` | no | - |  |
| itemRender | `ItemRender<any>` | no | - |  |
| listType | `enum` | no | - |  |
| locale | `UploadLocale` | no | - |  |
| maxCount | `number` | no | - | Config max count of `fileList`. Will replace current one when `maxCount` is 1 |
| method | `enum` | no | - |  |
| multiple | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| name | `string` | no | - |  |
| onChange | `((info: UploadChangeParam<UploadFile<any>>) => void)` | no | - |  |
| onDownload | `((file: UploadFile<any>) => void)` | no | - |  |
| onDrop | `((event: DragEvent<HTMLDivElement>) => void)` | no | - |  |
| onPreview | `((file: UploadFile<any>) => void)` | no | - |  |
| onRemove | `((file: UploadFile<any>) => boolean | void | Promise<boolean | void>)` | no | - |  |
| openFileDialogOnClick | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| prefixCls | `string` | no | - |  |
| previewFile | `PreviewFileHandler` | no | - |  |
| progress | `UploadListProgressProps` | no | - |  |
| rootClassName | `string` | no | - |  |
| showUploadList | `boolean | ShowUploadListInterface<any>` | no | - |  |
| style | `CSSProperties` | no | - |  |
| styles | `DeepStylesType<{ root?: CSSProperties; list?: CSSProperties; item?: CSSProperties | undefined; trigger?: CSSProperties | undefined; } | undefined> | ((info: { ...; }) => DeepStylesType<...>)` | no | - |  |
| supportServerRender | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| type | `enum` | no | - |  |
| withCredentials | `boolean` | no | - |  |

## Watermark (Phản hồi)

Phủ chữ/logo mờ lên nội dung để bảo vệ.

Import: `import { Watermark } from 'antd';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| className | `string` | no | - |  |
| content | `string | string[]` | no | - |  |
| font | `{ color?: string | CanvasGradient | CanvasPattern; fontSize?: string | number; fontWeight?: number | "normal" | "lighter" | "bold" | "bolder" | undefined; fontStyle?: "normal" | ... 3 more ... | undefined; fontFamily?: string | undefined; textAlign?: CanvasTextAlign | undefined; } | undefined` | no | - |  |
| gap | `[number, number]` | no | - |  |
| height | `number` | no | - |  |
| image | `string` | no | - |  |
| inherit | `boolean` | no | - |  |
| offset | `[number, number]` | no | - |  |
| onRemove | `(() => void)` | no | - | @since 6.0.0 |
| rootClassName | `string` | no | - |  |
| rotate | `number` | no | - |  |
| style | `CSSProperties` | no | - |  |
| width | `number` | no | - |  |
| zIndex | `number` | no | - |  |

## Phân lớp (Z-index) (Nền tảng)

Thang z-index chuẩn để xếp lớp các bề mặt nổi.
